revision.comment: Fix [[Special:LintErrors|Linter]] errors. Fix invalid image options. strip trailing "px" off size parameters if present
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23630749988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly><nowiki /><!-- This nowiki tag helps prevent whitespace at the top of articles. -->{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}<!-- Tracking categories
-->{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}<!--
--></includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24984760715|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly><nowiki />{{#tag:indicator|[[File:{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{width|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{width}}}}}|20}}x{{#if:{{{height|}}}|{{Str number/trim|{{{height}}}}}|20}}px
 |{{#ifeq:{{{link|+}}}|{{{link|-}}}|link={{{link}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{wikilink|+}}}|{{{wikilink|-}}}|link={{{wikilink}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{2|+}}}|{{{2|-}}}|link={{{2}}}|}}}}}}
 |{{#if:{{{alt|}}}|alt={{{alt}}}}}
 |{{{text|{{{description|{{{3|}}}}}}}}}]]
|name = {{#if:{{{sortkey|}}}|{{{sortkey}}}-}}{{#if:{{{name|}}}|{{{name}}}|{{#if:{{{id|}}}|{{{id}}}|{{{image|{{{imagename|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}}}}}}}{{Category handler
|user = {{{usercat|}}}
|main = {{{maincat|}}}
|subpage = {{{subpage|no}}}
|nocat = {{{nocat|}}}
}}{{#invoke:Check for unknown parameters|check|unknown=|preview=Page using [[Template:Top icon]] with unknown parameter "_VALUE_"|showblankpositional=1| 1 | 2 | 3 | alt | description | height | id | image | imagename | link | maincat | name | nocat | sortkey | subpage | text | usercat | width | wikilink }}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Pages using Top icon with unknown parameters|_VALUE_{{PAGENAME}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
